---
title: "Presentation and Interactivity"
author:
  name: "Ottavia M. Epifania, Ph.D."
  email: ottavia.epifania@unitn.it
affiliation: "ARCA summer school"
format: 
  revealjs: 
    self-contained: true
    theme: [simple, custom.scss]
    logo: "img/peacock.jpg"
    footer: "[Presentations](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/)"
    scrollable: true
    transition: none
    transition-speed: slow
    background-transition: fade
    slide-number:  c/t
    show-slide-number: all
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  fig-align: center
  out-width: 80%
  echo: false
code-annotations: select
---


```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: setup

library(emoji)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(DT)
```



# Creating slides show 

## A new slide
